title: PCAF Standard - Methodological Guidance for Emissions Measurement and Disclosure

parts.name: Financed Emissions
parts.definition: Emissions attributable to loans and investments across 10 asset classes

parts.name: Facilitated Emissions
parts.definition: Emissions attributable to their capital market issuance activities

parts.name: Insurance-Associated Emissions
parts.definition: Emissions attributable to re/insurance and underwriting activities

note: As the PCAF Standard continues to evolve, additional asset classes and case studies will be added
